targets.query:
from(bucket: "soldering")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "soldering_session")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "power_w")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["tool"] == "Tool1")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: float(v: r._value) }))
  |> yield(name: "Tool1 Power")

from(bucket: "soldering")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "soldering_session")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "power_w")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["tool"] == "Tool2")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: float(v: r._value) }))
  |> yield(name: "Tool2 Power")

from(bucket: "soldering")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "soldering_session")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "temperature_c")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["tool"] == "Tool1")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "Tool1 Temp")

from(bucket: "soldering")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "soldering_session")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "temperature_c")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["tool"] == "Tool2")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "Tool2 Temp")

from(bucket: "soldering")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "soldering_session")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "power_w")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["tool"] == "Tool1")
  |> integral(unit: 1h, column: "_value")
  |> yield(name: "Wh Tool1")

from(bucket: "soldering")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "soldering_session")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "power_w")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["tool"] == "Tool2")
  |> integral(unit: 1h, column: "_value")
  |> yield(name: "Wh Tool2")

from(bucket: "soldering")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "soldering_session")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "temperature_c")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["tool"] == "Tool1")
  |> mean()
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "soldering")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "soldering_session")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "temperature_c")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["tool"] == "Tool2")
  |> mean()
  |> yield(name: "mean")
